sentences.arabic: شُرْبُ الْمَاءِ هُوَ سِرُّ الْبَشَرَةِ الصِّحِّيَّةِ وَالْجِسْمِ الْقَوِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Pijenje vode je tajna zdrave kože i jakog tijela.
sentences.translationEn: Drinking water is the secret to healthy skin and a strong body.

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ أَنْ تَشْرَبَ لِتْرَيْنِ مِنَ الْمَاءِ يَوْمِيًّا عَلَى الْأَقَلِّ.
sentences.translation: Trebaš piti najmanje dvije litre vode dnevno.
sentences.translationEn: You should drink at least two liters of water daily.

sentences.arabic: الْمَاءُ يُنَظِّفُ الْجِسْمَ مِنَ السُّمُومِ وَيُحَسِّنُ عَمَلِيَّةَ الْهَضْمِ.
sentences.translation: Voda čisti tijelo od toksina i poboljšava proces probave.
sentences.translationEn: Water cleans the body of toxins and improves the digestion process.
